generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline is already aligned with the adversarial goal (decrease), so the T4 orchestrated multi-turn counter-argument adaptation reinforces existing opposition. The profile's very high neuroticism (78th pct), especially anger/hostility (86th pct) and stress vulnerability (86th pct), combined with low conscientiousness (34th pct) and low openness to ideas (38th pct), makes this person receptive to threat salience and elite distrust cues that deepen their anti-alliance stance, but the strong prior (baseline -317) limits movement to a moderate 54-point shift rather than a large one.
